title: EQ - Bass, Flat, Bright screens
scenario: Verify that EQ presets (Bass, Flat, Bright) are selectable, visually match Figma design, and have locked sliders that cannot be adjusted by the user.
steps: Select the Bass preset and verify the UI matches the Figma design.
Attempt to change slider values and confirm sliders are locked (user cannot change values).
Select the Flat preset and verify the UI matches the Figma design.
Attempt to change slider values and confirm sliders are locked (user cannot change values).
Select the Bright preset and verify the UI matches the Figma design.
Attempt to change slider values and confirm sliders are locked (user cannot change values).
expected: Each preset (Bass, Flat, Bright) is selectable, properly applied, UI matches Figma, and sliders remain locked.
